---
title: " "
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="page-title">Engineering Cyanobacteria to Degrade PCBs</div>

<div class="research-layout">
<nav class="research-nav">
<p class="research-nav-title">Projects</p>
<a class="active" href="research-bph.html">PCB Degradation</a>
<a href="research-mars.html">Mars Habitation</a>
<a href="research-phylo.html">Microcystin Phylogenetics</a>
</nav>
<div class="research-content">

<img class="research-hero-img" src="images/research-bph.jpg" alt="Utah Lake">

## Background


*[Placeholder — the problem and why it matters. Describe harmful algal blooms, microcystin toxins, the Utah Lake context, and what motivated the project.]*

## Approach

*[Placeholder — your genetic engineering strategy: the BPH gene from soil bacteria, knocking out the microcystin-producing gene, knocking in the BPH pathway. A figure or diagram would go well here.]*

## Current Work

*[Placeholder — what's actively being worked on now: cloning, primer design, Gibson Assembly, troubleshooting.]*

## Future Directions

*[Placeholder — where the project is headed.]*

</div>
</div>
